description: Expected commercial value moved outside the selected period
Expected opportunity value did not close and is no longer recoverable
Closed-won opportunity amount changed positively or negatively versus the start-of-quarter snapshot
Future-period opportunity closed in the current period
Opportunity created after start of quarter and closed in quarter
Opportunity moved between commit best-case pipeline or omitted
Recognized revenue changed because realized rate or discounting differed from baseline
Recognized revenue changed because installed-base seats, usage, renewal, expansion, contraction, or churn differed from baseline
Recognized revenue changed because the mix of products, customers, segments, or regions differed from baseline
Recognized revenue moved between periods due to service dates billing starts or rev rec schedules
Credits, concessions, true-ups, or adjustments changed recognized revenue
Hosting compute storage or AI inference costs changed versus baseline
Support implementation or service delivery costs changed versus baseline
Salary bonus benefits headcount or contractor coverage differed from plan
Third-party services software partners or contractors differed from plan
Travel events campaigns or discretionary programs differed from plan
Invoices or accruals landed in a different period than planned
